message:
fix(sync): honor --json flag in flush and import output paths

Extend the use_json fix from execute_status to execute_flush and
execute_import — rename shadowed _json parameters to use_json and
replace ctx.is_json() checks with use_json so --robot/--json flags
control output format consistently across all sync subcommands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
